body_plan.core_shape: elongated reptilian body with crocodile-like snout, curled tail, and tall dorsal sail

parts.shape: long crocodile-like snout with jagged teeth
parts.placement: front of body, low to ground

parts.shape: round white eye with black pupil
row of small gray triangular spikes
parts.placement: along upper back, running length of body

parts.shape: white oval scales with blue dot pattern
solid red band with zigzag lower edge
thick yellow leg with black spots, bent forward
long gray curling tail, tightly spiraled at tip
parts.placement: extends left from body, curls into spiral

parts.shape: thick teal segmented coiled tail with dark red curled tuft at end
parts.placement: extends right and upward from rear body, coiling like a scorpion tail

distinctive_features: single tall red triangular sail on the back
long gray tail that curls into a tight spiral like a hose
separate thick teal coiled scorpion-like tail with dark red frayed tuft at the tip
mismatched legs: one yellow spotted leg with claw foot, one green leg with webbed foot
white belly covered in blue polka-dot scales bordered by a jagged red stripe
crocodile snout with single thin red horn and a whisker-like curl above the eye
locomotion: low crawling/walking gait using two mismatched legs, tail used for balance or as a secondary scorpion-like appendage
vibe: a scrappy backyard-invented dragon-gator with a scorpion tail and a sailfin, stitched together from spare parts
